# status.txt — af status dashboard over fixture sessions.
#
# Fixtures: alpha (active), beta (suspended), gamma (completed).
# Scenarios:
#   1. plain status         → header + active/suspended rows; completed hidden.
#   2. --all                → completed row included.
#   3. --filter suspended   → only the matching lifecycle state.
#   4. --json (+ --filter)  → schema-1 envelope with per-row objects.
#   5. failure              → --filter without a value is a usage error.
#
# None of the fixtures carries PR state, so status never shells out to gh;
# the PR column renders "-".

env HOME=$WORK/home

# ── Scenario 1: dashboard hides completed workstreams by default ─────────────
exec af status
stdout 'NAME\s+STATUS\s+BRANCH\s+PR'
stdout 'alpha\s+active\s+feat/alpha\s+-'
stdout 'beta\s+suspended\s+feat/beta\s+-'
! stdout 'gamma'

# ── Scenario 2: --all includes completed workstreams ─────────────────────────
exec af status --all
stdout 'gamma\s+completed\s+feat/gamma\s+-'

# ── Scenario 3: --filter selects one lifecycle state ─────────────────────────
exec af status --filter suspended
stdout 'beta\s+suspended'
! stdout 'alpha'
! stdout 'gamma'

# A filter matching nothing degrades to the empty placeholder, exit 0.
exec af status --filter abandoned
stdout 'no workstreams'

# ── Scenario 4: --json emits the schema-1 envelope ───────────────────────────
exec af status --json
stdout '"schema": 1'
stdout '"name": "alpha"'
stdout '"status": "active"'
stdout '"branch": "feat/alpha"'
stdout '"name": "beta"'

exec af status --json --filter active
stdout '"name": "alpha"'
! stdout '"name": "beta"'

# ── Scenario 5 (failure): --filter demands a value ───────────────────────────
! exec af status --filter
stderr 'flag needs an argument: --filter'

# Positional args are also rejected.
! exec af status extra
stderr 'unknown command "extra" for "af status"'

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/alpha/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-00000000000a"
name = "alpha"
status = "active"
created_at = 2026-05-21T12:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/wt/alpha"
branch = "feat/alpha"
base_branch = "main"
repo_slug = "github.com/owner/repo"

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/beta/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-00000000000b"
name = "beta"
status = "suspended"
created_at = 2026-05-22T09:30:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/wt/beta"
branch = "feat/beta"
base_branch = "main"
repo_slug = "github.com/owner/repo"

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/gamma/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-00000000000c"
name = "gamma"
status = "completed"
created_at = 2026-05-23T15:45:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/wt/gamma"
branch = "feat/gamma"
base_branch = "main"
repo_slug = "github.com/owner/repo"
